# pheno-forge-smoke

> End-to-end smoke test for the 4-PR forgecode improvement stack (ADR-096).

## What it does

Loads `libpheno_bridge.dylib` (C-ABI shared lib from `pheno-cdylib-bridge`) and exercises the 4-scope memory facade end-to-end:

1. `bridge_load` — `pheno_bridge_version()` returns expected semver
2. `sidecar_health` (live-sidecar mode) — probes `:3030`, `:8283`, `:8000`
3. `scope_episodic` — store + recall + forget through `CompositeAdapter(scope=Episodic)`
4. `scope_identity` — same, `scope=Identity`
5. `scope_project_knowledge` — same, `scope=ProjectKnowledge`
6. `scope_fallback` — same, `scope=Fallback`
7. `composite_construct` — `CompositeAdapter` opens + closes cleanly

## Quickstart

```bash
# Build
cd ../pheno-cdylib-bridge && cargo build --release
cd ../pheno-forge-smoke && cargo build --release

# Run (mock mode, no sidecars required)
./target/release/pheno-forge-smoke

# Run (live sidecar mode)
./scripts/run-smoke.sh sidecar
```

## Modes

| Mode | What | Use case |
|---|---|---|
| `--mode=mock` *(default)* | Bridge loads; route calls expected to fail | CI dry-runs |
| `--mode=sidecar` | Sidecars probed; route calls must succeed | Pre-flight |
| `--mode=c` | Compile-only parity with C smoke | Test rig parity |

## Output

- Human-readable: colored checkmarks + summary
- `--jsonl`: one line per check + a final summary line

## Stack it tests

```
user -> pheno-forge-plugins (6 systemd sidecars)
     -> pheno-cdylib-bridge (8 C-ABI symbols)
     -> thegent-memory v2 (MemoryPort + CompositeAdapter)
     -> forge_pheno_memory (upstream forgecode workspace crate)
```

## Companion repos

- `KooshaPari/pheno-forge-plugins` — sidecar bundle (v0.1.0)
- `KooshaPari/pheno-cdylib-bridge` — C-ABI shared lib (v0.1.0)
- `KooshaPari/thegent#1144` — memory v2 polyglot facade
- `tailcallhq/forgecode#3559` — forge_pheno_memory workspace crate

## ADR refs

- **ADR-096**: forgecode improvement (this smoke's parent)
- **ADR-097**: eval harness (consumes this smoke)
- **ADR-098**: additional adapters (uses this smoke as regression baseline)
